title: QFS3 Launcher v1.0.10 Changelog
content: New Features • Fixed Distant Horizon JVM Warning
author: Waltinho

title: QFS3 Launcher v1.0.7 Changelog
content: New Features • Removed servers.dat from being overwritten
author: Waltinho

title: QFS3 Launcher v1.0.6 Changelog
content: New Features • Added year to news dates • Auto-refresh QFS3 Server Status every 30 seconds • Launch multiple Minecraft instances with the same modpack • New QFS3 icon for the launcher and modpack Improvements • Updated launch button title • Fixed Launcher Behavior settings text for clarity [View full changelog](https://github.com/QFSLive/QFS3-Launcher/releases/tag/v1.0.7)
author: Waltinho

title: Multiple Instances
content: To launch multiple minecraft instances enable the following settings. Settings > Launcher Behavior > Keep Launcher Open This will keep the launcher open and you will be able to Launch QFS3 again or even under a different Minecraft account.
author: Waltinho

title: Resolved Multiplayer Servers
content:
Servers now connect to their respected names

• QFS - Main Server
• Flatworld - Builder Server
• Test - Test Server
author: Waltinho

title: Ongoing Testing
content: Things are getting better with every update. Launch is near (I hope)
author: Waltinho

title: Welcome to QFS3
content: The Federation uplink is now online. All systems functional.
author: Waltinho

title: Uplink Established
content: Interface translation to English is 100% complete. Ready for deployment.
author: Waltinho
